paymentTerms: Monthly interim valuations. 30-day payment terms from invoice date. 5% retention released 6 weeks post practical completion.

lines.description: Strip out — removal of existing ceiling tiles, partitions, carpet, fittings to skip
Suspended ceiling — Armstrong Ultima 600×600 tile system, complete installation
LVT flooring — Amtico Spacia (client-specified), supply and fit incl. DPM
Stud partition reconfiguration — new meeting room pod (12m²) and breakout area
Full decoration — plaster skim, mist coat, two coats emulsion (walls & ceilings)
M&E first and second fix — lighting, power, data containment per layout drawing
Glazed manifestation film to meeting room partitions (logo pattern, client-supplied artwork)
Project management, site supervision, welfare, and waste disposal
